codeReview.summary: The reviewed feature adds VAL-REG-002 coverage that seeds distinct workspace facts, switches organization/workspace context, and proves current-workspace scoping across calendar, list, and timesheet. The later fix commit 6f1763a addresses the original scrutiny gap by scoping the post-switch calendar checks to the calendar grid, so the combined feature pair now satisfies the documented timer page-family workspace-scoping requirement.

summary: Pass: reviewed transcript skeleton, handoffs, and both diffs for commits a353646f7d2e25c01b9afcdb3f6e818d81666291 and 6f1763a. The original feature covers workspace/org switching across timer calendar/list/timesheet, and the follow-up fix closes the prior failure by making the calendar post-switch assertions view-local via `calendar-grid-scroll-area`, leaving no blocking issues.
